ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environment where the simulation was run */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the control algorithm used in the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the simulation */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation configuration */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of time steps in the simulation */,
  "error_log" TEXT /* Log any errors that occurred during the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "time_step" INTEGER /* Time step of the data point */,
  "x" REAL /* Position of the x-axis */,
  "xdot" REAL /* Velocity of the x-axis */,
  "theta" REAL /* Position of the theta-axis */,
  "thetadot" REAL /* Velocity of the theta-axis */,
  "x_1" REAL /* Position of the x-axis at the next time step */,
  "xdot_1" REAL /* Velocity of the x-axis at the next time step */,
  "theta_1" REAL /* Position of the theta-axis at the next time step */,
  "thetadot_1" REAL /* Velocity of the theta-axis at the next time step */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact timestamp for each data point */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the specific component the data pertains to */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the sensor that captured the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the environment in JSON format */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location where the environment is set up */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date when the environment was set up or last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the algorithm in JSON format */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the person who created or last modified the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, data science) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., manual input, default value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the result belongs to */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the result (e.g., performance metric, log file) */,
  "result_value" TEXT /* Value of the result */,
  "result_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the result file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was generated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the simulation (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role in JSON format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., configuration, log, result) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
